## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Verification

List the commands or cases used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behaviour.
- [ ] The full test suite passes with FPC 3.2.2.
- [ ] Relevant examples compile and run.
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the reference documentation.
- [ ] User-visible changes are recorded under `Unreleased` in `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] No compiler output or local IDE state is included.
